title: Minerally Me!
description: This mod can greatly enhance the experience of mining adventures. When mining ore, stone, deepslate, sand and red sand, one of these items can fall out: iron nuggets, gold nuggets, gold ingots or even diamonds.
body: This mod can greatly enhance the experience of mining adventures. When mining ore, stone, deepslate, sand and red sand, one of these items can fall out: iron nuggets, gold nuggets, gold ingots or even diamonds. When a mineral is found, the chat will display the message _«There's something shiny here...»_!
